case_title: IRASEMA ALFARO ET AL VS. HECTOR ARMANDO CARRILLO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ALFARO, IRASEMA RAMOS ALFARO, GERARDO CARRILLO, HECTOR ARMANDO AKA HECTOR DIAZ CARRILLO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALFARO, IRASEMA RAMOS ALFARO, GERARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, HECTOR ARMANDO AKA HECTOR DIAZ CARRILLO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALFARO, IRASEMA RAMOS ALFARO, GERARDO AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, HECTOR ARMANDO AKA HECTOR DIAZ CARRILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $100 SERVED JAN-17-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, HECTOR ARMANDO AKA HECTOR DIAZ CARRILLO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS IRASEMA ALFARO AND GERARDO RAMOS ALFARO ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT HECTOR ARMANDO CARRILLO IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES WERE ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINISA #301593. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
